title: tabernaemontana gracillima
intro: Tabernaemontana gracillima, also known as the slender tabernaemontana, is a plant species in the Apocynaceae family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds, and is traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Tabernaemontana gracillima include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat respiratory issues, among others. In traditional medicine, the plant is often prepared as a decoction or infusion, and can also be used in the form of a paste or extract to make herbal preparations.
